title: Databricks connector for Power BI now supports the ADBC driver (Public Preview)
body:
You can set the Databricks connector for Power BI to use the [Arrow Database Connectivity (ADBC)](https://github.com/apache/arrow-adbc/blob/main/csharp/src/Drivers/Databricks/readme.md) driver instead of the ODBC driver.

See [Configure ADBC or ODBC driver for Power BI](/aws/en/partners/bi/power-bi-adbc).

ref_links.text: Configure ADBC or ODBC driver for Power BI
